channel.title: Xiaomi 12T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 12T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI 23.5.6 Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12T Global
item.description:
New Public Beta Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12T Global

Codename: plato

Version: 23.5.6 | 14.0

Size: 6.8 GB

MD5: None

Changelog:
Android 14 Beta.

Download: Here
